pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property to 17 to align with the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 11, failing to enforce Java 17 language features or compatibility checks required by the migration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate the annotation API dependency from the legacy javax namespace to the Jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3 and Java EE/Jakarta EE standards.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 and modern Jakarta EE runtimes do not support javax.annotation; using the old artifact causes runtime NoClassDefFoundError or compile errors if the new API is expected.

pom.xml.general_idea: Set the scope of the Jakarta Annotation API to 'provided' as it is typically supplied by the application server or runtime environment.
Bump the javax.annotation-api version property to 1.3.5 to ensure compatibility with the new Jakarta artifact versioning or security patches.
Upgrade the Maven Compiler Plugin to a version that fully supports Java 17 compilation features and bug fixes.
Upgrade the JaCoCo Maven Plugin to a version compatible with Java 17 class file formats.
Upgrade the Maven Checkstyle Plugin to a newer snapshot version.
